seoTitle: Silent Grove vs Silverton — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Silent Grove and Silverton. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Silent Grove vs Silverton: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Silent Grove and Silverton.
heading: Silent Grove vs Silverton — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Silent Grove, New South Wales and Silverton, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Silent Grove has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Silverton (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Silent Grove or Silverton safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Silent Grove has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Silverton scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Silent Grove scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Silverton scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Silent Grove or Silverton?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Silent Grove has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.37% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
